title: Lee Kershaw
extract:
Lee Kershaw (born 2 May 1999) is an English professional rugby league footballer who plays as a winger for the Huddersfield Giants, on a one-week loan from Hull Kingston Rovers in the Super League.
He has previously played for Wakefield Trinity and London Broncos in the Super League. He has spent time on loan at Oldham in League 1 and the Championship, and at Castleford Tigers in the Super League.
